en: It'll be fine. It's all right. Oh, my God. Okay.
ko: 괜찮아. 다 괜찮아. 오, 세상에. 좋아.

en: How long will I love you?
As long as stars are above you? Fine.
ko: 별이 너 위에 있는 한? 좋아.

en: Longer if I can. Good. How long will I need you?
ko: 내가 할 수 있다면 더 오래. 좋아. 내가 너를 얼마나 필요할까?

en: As long as the seasons meet tomorrow?
How long will I get to you?
ko: 내가 너에게 얼마나 갈 수 있을까?

en: As long as I live to?
How long will I love you?
As long as stars are above you?
